name: Greymon (Blue)

signature_move.name: Mega Flame
signature_move.description: Spews a  blast of high-temperature flames from its mouth.

description: A Virus attribute Greymon with a bluish-black body. While it has been called a 'feral Greymon', befitting its more violent disposition, it is in no way a lone wolf and possesses enough intelligence to work together with its allies as a team. Its Special Move is a blast of high-temperature flames spewed from its mouth ( Mega Flame ).
